name: Ashforge Quarry
seasonal_change: storms, eruptions, and avalanche risk reorder work gangs and sleeping patterns through much of the year.
seasonal_effects: storms, eruptions, and avalanche risk reorder work gangs and sleeping patterns through much of the year.
Public schedules, prices, crowding, and enforcement intensity all change before locals bother explaining why.
Ceremony, supply pressure, and route reliability do not all peak at the same time, forcing local adaptation.
